faq.title: How to Use
faq.desc: Turn your long-form videos into dozens of viral, ready-to-post clips in minutes:
faq.step1_desc: Paste a YouTube URL or select a local video file from your computer.
faq.step2_desc: Enter your OpenAI or Gemini API Key in Settings to power the AI analysis.
faq.step3_desc: Hit 'Generate Viral Clips'. The AI will find the best hooks, create transcripts, and add subtitles automatically.
faq.step4_desc: Not quite right? Use AI Correction or Re-render to tweak aspect ratios and subtitle styles before downloading.
faq.note_desc: Add a Pexels API Key in Settings to instantly spice up your clips with relevant b-roll footage.

history.title: 🕒 History
history.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this history? All related clip files and metadata will be permanently removed from local storage.
history.ai_correct_desc: Enter a custom instruction to re-run the AI clip selection from scratch.
history.ai_prompt_placeholder: e.g. Focus only on funny coding moments

toast.api_key_req: API Key is required! Please configure it in Settings.
toast.custom_config_req: Custom Base URL and Model Name are not set! Please configure in Settings.

busy.warning: Please wait until the process completes. The app is temporarily locked so no other processes run concurrently — do not close the app.

faqs.a: The app is 100% free and runs locally on your machine. You only need to provide your own API Key (OpenAI/Gemini), which typically costs pennies per usage.

faqs.q: What video sources can I use?
faqs.a: You can paste any public YouTube link (including Shorts) or upload local video files directly from your computer.

faqs.q: The AI picked the wrong highlights. How can I fix this?
faqs.a: Use the 'AI Correction' feature in the History tab. You can give the AI specific instructions like 'Focus only on the SEO tips' and it will regenerate the clip selection.
Once you add a free Pexels API Key in settings, the AI automatically finds and inserts relevant stock footage (B-Roll) based on what's being said, making your clips much more engaging.

faqs.q: Can I resize clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Go to History and click Re-render on any clip. You can switch aspect ratios (9:16, 4:5, 1:1, 16:9) and change subtitle styles without starting from scratch.

faqs.q: Why does the video rendering take a while?
faqs.a: For maximum privacy, Auto Clipper processes all video rendering (ffmpeg) locally on your computer. The speed depends entirely on your hardware specs.
